login.signInSubtext: Glad to have you back. Let's keep learning and growing together.
login.ogeraDescription: Ogera is Africa's premier student job platform that connects ambitious students with flexible opportunities and instant mobile money payments.
login.ogeraDedicated: Ogera is dedicated to solving the challenges students face.
login.enter2FACode: Enter the 6-digit code from Google Authenticator to complete login.

register.connectTrustedEmployers: Connect with trusted employers, earn money instantly via mobile payments, and maintain your academic excellence – all in one platform designed for African students.
register.testimonial: I earned $500 last month while maintaining my 3.8 GPA! Ogera's academic tracking kept me focused.
register.createAccount: Create your account with us below
register.registrationSuccess: Registration successful! Please check your email to verify your account.

auth.forgotPasswordSubtext: Enter your email for the verification process. We will send a 4-digit code to your email.

profile.analyticsInfoDesc: These metrics are updated in real-time from your database. Total Users includes all registered accounts, Total Students represents users with student role, Active Jobs shows jobs currently open for applications, and Platform Wallet displays the total platform earnings minus payouts to students.

trustScoreDescription.Limited: Limited verification progress. Complete more verifications to improve your trust score and access.
trustScoreDescription.Emerging: Early stage. Complete email, phone, and academic verification to unlock full access.
trustScoreDescription.Developing: Shows potential with some verifications completed. Requires additional verification for full access.
trustScoreDescription.Competent: Good standing with most verifications complete. You have access to core platform features.
trustScoreDescription.Exceptional: Fully verified and in excellent standing. You have full access to all platform features.
